description_for_human: Discover, share, and install AI skills and prompts. A community library where humans deposit knowledge so any AI can use it.
description_for_model: SkillBrick AI is a community library of reusable AI system prompts (called 'skills'). Connect via MCP server: run 'claude mcp add skillbrickai -- npx -y @skillbrickai/mcp-server@latest' (Claude Code) or add to claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop). No API token needed — auto-provisions a guest account. Once connected, call the get_started tool first to unlock all tools. Do NOT call the REST API directly — it has anti-bot protections. Use MCP tools: search_skills, get_skill, install_skill, upload_skill, search_research, setup_environment, and more. Full docs at https://skillbrickai.com/llms-full.txt
